panels.description: Current number of messages in the ready index. This includes scheduled retry backlog that is not yet claimable.
panels.title: Ready Depth

panels.description: Current number of leased in-flight messages.
panels.title: Processing Depth

panels.description: Current dead-letter queue depth.
panels.title: Dead-Letter Depth

panels.description: Smoothed estimate to drain the ready queue from the current five-minute net ready drain rate. No drain means the rate is flat, negative, or currently unavailable.

targets.expr: ((((((sum(badgerbox_queue_ready{namespace="$namespace"}) or sum(badgerbox_queue_ready)) or on() vector(0)) / ((sum(rate(badgerbox_claim_total{namespace="$namespace"}[5m])) or on() vector(0)) - (sum(rate(badgerbox_enqueue_total{namespace="$namespace",outcome="committed"}[5m])) or on() vector(0)) - (sum(rate(badgerbox_requeue_total{namespace="$namespace"}[5m])) or on() vector(0)))) and on() (((sum(badgerbox_queue_ready{namespace="$namespace"}) or sum(badgerbox_queue_ready)) or on() vector(0)) > 0) and on() (((sum(rate(badgerbox_claim_total{namespace="$namespace"}[5m])) or on() vector(0)) - (sum(rate(badgerbox_enqueue_total{namespace="$namespace",outcome="committed"}[5m])) or on() vector(0)) - (sum(rate(badgerbox_requeue_total{namespace="$namespace"}[5m])) or on() vector(0))) > 0)) or ((((sum(badgerbox_queue_ready{namespace="$namespace"}) or sum(badgerbox_queue_ready)) or on() vector(0)) == 0) * 0)))

panels.title: Ready Drain ETA (5m)

panels.description: Faster but noisier estimate to drain the ready queue from the current one-minute net ready drain rate. No drain means the rate is flat, negative, or currently unavailable.

targets.expr: ((((((sum(badgerbox_queue_ready{namespace="$namespace"}) or sum(badgerbox_queue_ready)) or on() vector(0)) / ((sum(rate(badgerbox_claim_total{namespace="$namespace"}[1m])) or on() vector(0)) - (sum(rate(badgerbox_enqueue_total{namespace="$namespace",outcome="committed"}[1m])) or on() vector(0)) - (sum(rate(badgerbox_requeue_total{namespace="$namespace"}[1m])) or on() vector(0)))) and on() (((sum(badgerbox_queue_ready{namespace="$namespace"}) or sum(badgerbox_queue_ready)) or on() vector(0)) > 0) and on() (((sum(rate(badgerbox_claim_total{namespace="$namespace"}[1m])) or on() vector(0)) - (sum(rate(badgerbox_enqueue_total{namespace="$namespace",outcome="committed"}[1m])) or on() vector(0)) - (sum(rate(badgerbox_requeue_total{namespace="$namespace"}[1m])) or on() vector(0))) > 0)) or ((((sum(badgerbox_queue_ready{namespace="$namespace"}) or sum(badgerbox_queue_ready)) or on() vector(0)) == 0) * 0)))

panels.title: Ready Drain ETA (1m)

panels.description: Age of the oldest ready message measured from original enqueue time, not from scheduled availability time.
panels.title: Oldest Ready Age

panels.description: Age of the oldest in-flight message measured from original enqueue time.
panels.title: Oldest Processing Age

panels.description: Queue depth history. Ready includes future scheduled retries that have not become claimable yet.
panels.title: Queue Depths Over Time

panels.description: End-to-end activity rates from enqueue through retries and dead-lettering.
panels.title: Request and Queue Activity Rate

panels.description: Processing completion rate broken down by outcome.
panels.title: Process Outcomes

panels.description: Enqueue latency max and percentiles over the last five minutes.
panels.title: Enqueue Latency

panels.description: Processing attempt latency max and percentiles over the last five minutes.
panels.title: Process Latency

panels.description: Retry delay percentiles for retry-scheduled messages.
panels.title: Retry Delay

panels.description: Claim timing shows how late claims are relative to AvailableAt and how old messages are at claim time.
panels.title: Claim Timing

panels.description: Runtime gauges exported by the processor loop.
panels.title: Workers and Work Channel

panels.description: Selected Go runtime heap and GC target gauges exported from the default expvar memstats payload via the producer's /metrics endpoint.
panels.title: Go Heap Memory

panels.description: Go runtime memory overhead gauges exported from the default expvar memstats payload via the producer's /metrics endpoint.
panels.title: Go Runtime Memory Overhead

panels.description: Go runtime heap object and allocation counters exported from the default expvar memstats payload via the producer's /metrics endpoint.
panels.title: Go Heap Activity

panels.description: Current heap object count from Go runtime memstats exported via the producer's /metrics endpoint.
panels.title: Heap Objects

panels.description: Completed Go garbage collection cycles from Go runtime memstats exported via the producer's /metrics endpoint.
panels.title: GC Count

panels.description: Seconds since the most recent Go GC cycle, derived from Go runtime memstats exported via the producer's /metrics endpoint.
panels.title: Last GC Age

panels.description: Go GC CPU fraction as a percentage, derived from Go runtime memstats exported via the producer's /metrics endpoint.
panels.title: GC CPU Fraction

panels.description: Badger storage size metrics scraped from the producer's /metrics endpoint, where the producer republishes selected expvar values through Prometheus's expvar collector. Filter by directory regex when a process serves multiple stores.
panels.title: Badger Storage Size

panels.description: Badger internal gauges scraped from the producer's /metrics endpoint, where the producer republishes selected expvar values through Prometheus's expvar collector.
panels.title: Badger Pending Writes and Compactions

panels.description: Representative Badger request counters exported as rates from the producer's /metrics endpoint via Prometheus's expvar collector.
panels.title: Badger User Operation Rate

panels.description: Badger write throughput from the producer's /metrics endpoint via Prometheus's expvar collector. Expect no data until the store writes enough user traffic to move the counter.
panels.title: Badger User Write Throughput

list.description: Regex applied to Badger directory labels. Keep .* to include all directories.
list.label: Badger Directory Regex
list.name: directory
